items.label: Please walk around first and take any photos of broken, missing or damaged items.

sections.name: Interior
instructions: Checkbox completion is the most important item.
Optional photo fields are compact — open only when needed.

items.label: Bedroom 1: Vacuum/mop/sweep floor
Bedroom 1/Bed: Remove sheets, inspect mattress pad/pillows/comforters for stains, make bed with clean linens
Bedroom 1: Look under bed + open all drawers for left items (tag and return to office)
Bedroom 1: Condition of bed frame and headboard
Bedroom 1: Entire bedroom once cleaned
Bedroom 2: Vacuum/mop/sweep floor
Bedroom 2/Bed: Remove sheets, inspect mattress pad/pillows/comforters for stains, make bed with clean linens
Bedroom 2: Look under bed + open all drawers for left items (tag and return to office)
Bedroom 2: Condition of bed frame and headboard
Bedroom 2: Entire bedroom once cleaned
Bedroom 3: Vacuum/mop/sweep floor
Bedroom 3/Bed: Remove sheets, inspect mattress pad/pillows/comforters for stains, make bed with clean linens
Bedroom 3: Look under bed + open all drawers for left items (tag and return to office)
Bedroom 3: Condition of bed frame and headboard
Bedroom 3: Entire bedroom once cleaned
Matching towels and sheets on all beds and bathrooms
Living Room: Wipe down all furniture, vacuum/mop/sweep
Living Room/Couch: Remove all cushions to discard crumbs, place decorative pillows, vacuum under couch
Living Room/Smart TV: Wipe fingerprints/dust, check remote batteries, sanitize remotes, turn on TV and verify display
Kitchen: Empty trash can and replace with new bags
Kitchen: Sanitize appliances and clean all surfaces (inside/outside cabinets, counters, etc.)
Kitchen: Restock starter sets (1 sponge, 10 dishwasher packets, 3 paper towel rolls, splenda) + coffee/sugar/creamer/supplies
Kitchen: Entire kitchen after cleaning
Kitchen/Dishwasher: Empty dishes, ensure door closes tightly, fill rinse aid
Kitchen/Dishwasher: Photo of inside and outside cleaned
Kitchen/Refrigerator: Remove all food, clean shelves/drawers, wipe front
Kitchen/Refrigerator: Temperature on normal setting
Kitchen/Refrigerator: Photo of fridge + freezer (inside and outside)
Kitchen/Sink: Wipe sink, polish faucet, clean backsplash
Kitchen/Garbage disposal: Run with dish soap; clear debris and odors
Kitchen/Microwave: Wipe front/back, clean tray, ensure buttons function
Kitchen/Microwave: Photo inside and outside
Kitchen/Toaster: Remove crumbs and wipe under toaster
Kitchen/Stove top: Clean thoroughly and test all burners
Kitchen/Oven: Clean inside/outside; report if damaged or not working
Kitchen/Oven: Photo of entire stove top + inside/outside of oven
Laundry room: Return all items to laundry if needed (high chair/gates)
Laundry room: Get rid of guest hangers that don’t match
Laundry room/Washer/Dryer: Empty both, clean lint trap, leave washer door/lip open
Laundry room/Washer/Dryer: Required photo
Bathroom 1: Empty waste basket and replace bag
Bathroom 1: Amenities have been replaced?
Bathroom 1/Shower/Bathtub: Clean, scrub, sanitize, remove mildew/mold, verify shower head + drain
Bathroom 1/Toilet: Clean, scrub, sanitize
Bathroom 1/Toilet: Flush check + seat down (required photo)
Bathroom 1/Sink: Clean/sanitize, verify hot/cold water + drain, polish faucet
Bathroom 1: Entire bathroom after cleaning (required photo)
Bathroom 2: Empty waste basket and replace bag
Bathroom 2: Amenities have been replaced?
Bathroom 2/Shower/Bathtub: Clean, scrub, sanitize, remove mildew/mold, verify shower head + drain
Bathroom 2/Toilet: Clean, scrub, sanitize
Bathroom 2/Toilet: Flush check + seat down (required photo)
Bathroom 2/Sink: Clean/sanitize, verify hot/cold water + drain, polish faucet
Bathroom 2: Entire bathroom after cleaning (required photo)
Front door condition
Deck: Sweep
Deck: Wipe front/top/barn furniture
Deck/Patio Furniture: Wipe down and return to correct place
Grill: Scrape grates with wire brush
Please let us know if the grill is overly dirty
Firepit area cleaned and chairs in proper place
Dart board: Condition

items.label: Door mats: Check and replace dirty floor mats
High Chair: Condition
